notes: It's a Alpha Playtest, just switch to GE-Proton and the game run without problems.

Does not launch on latest Proton. On Proton 9.0-4, gets to Easy Anti-Cheat loading and immediately crashes after that. Running the .exe in Wine I was able to get the game to launch, however it crashes before reaching main menu.

Another player reported it worked in Wayland in Proton 9.0-4 with launch options provided. However, nothing I tried has worked on X11. I believe it's related to Easy Anti-Cheat.

gpu: AMD Radeon RX 7800 XT (radeonsi, navi32, LLVM 20.1.8, DRM 3.64, 6.16.8-arch3-1)
notes: Game fails to shader cache with CPU pin at 100% and fails to load

Developers refused to add linux support. I tried several versions of proton, including GE, I also tried installing visual c++ as other reviews said. It doesn't work. You can open the game if you bypass EAC by executing the game binaries, and you'll have 30+gigs worth of a main menu.

I went into their discord and told them linux was not working (despite the game initially saying it supported linux) and they straight up told me they won't work on linux. I backed this game in 2021 and I don't even get to play it. yikes
Does currently not work with live version
